videos.title: Perth Hills Gran Fondo 2025 Medio 90km 1500vm
videos.description:
My first event for 2025 . Was a great  event and a  shakedown opportunity for my Canyon Grail setup.
Some very windy conditions and  lessons were learnt in crosswind handling at speeds.

Perth Hills Tri Club Christmas Ride 2016
videos.description: Merry Christmas from all of us here at Perth Hills Tri Club.  Enjoy following our little jaunt through Kalamunda and Pickering Brook.

videos.title: Kalamunda Circuit Mountain Bike Trail
videos.description:
The last section of the Kalamunda Circuit mountain bike trail. Highlight is a cool 'North Shore' log ride

Shot with my Lumix FT1 mounted to my helmet
